# Aigei UI Assets

These derived PNGs were cropped/resized from the user's downloaded assets in `/素材`.

- `button-red.png`: 红色国风仙侠按钮
- `button-blue.png`: 仙侠按钮
- `panel-talisman.png`: 游戏边框标题栏标题框背景框国风古风
- `icon-blood.png`: 血
- `icon-bagua.png`: 八卦图(金色)
- `icon-talisman.png`: 灵符（一）
- `icon-sword-fire.png`: 轩辕离火剑
- `icon-sword-cross.png`: 宝刹双煞剑
- `pile-draw.png`: derived draw-pile marker from the talisman panel asset
- `pile-discard.png`: derived discard-pile marker from the talisman panel asset
